content: Next.js 15 App Router Route Handler streams a binary xlsx buffer via 'return new Response(buffer, { status: 200, headers: { Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=..., Content-Type: ... } })'; NextResponse and Response are interchangeable in Route Handlers. Blog examples use the legacy application/vnd.ms-excel MIME type -- the spec-correct type for .xlsx is application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet.
